title:
Here is a 7-day plan for you:
...
content:
Here is a 7-day plan for you:

Day 1: Breakfast - Smoothie bowl with spinach, almonds, and avocado. Add some protein powder for added protein. Serve with a handful of mixed berries.

Day 2: Breakfast - Oatmeal with almond milk, topped with a spoon of peanut butter and a handful of mixed berries.

Day 3: Breakfast - Yogurt with honey, topped with a spoon of peanut butter and a handful of mixed berries.

Day 4: Breakfast - Protein bar with a handful of mixed berries and some granola.

Day 5: Breakfast - Smoothie bowl with banana, peanut butter, and mixed berries.

Day 6: Breakfast - Smoothie bowl with spinach, almond milk, topped with a spoon of peanut butter and a handful of mixed berries.

Day 7: Breakfast - Oatmeal with almond milk, topped with a spoon of peanut butter and a handful of mixed berries.

This plan is designed to help you avoid the symptoms of a heart attack, such as chest pain, shortness of breath, and nausea. It's also designed to help you maintain good health, by focusing on heart-healthy foods and regular exercise. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to ask!
